name: rubric loop action card references pr-corpus origin tag when rule was promoted from pr-corpus
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/rubric-runs && printf 'rule_id: no-eval
provenance:
  - class: pr-corpus
    supporting_prs: [{number: 1, verbatim_quote: x, org: a, tier: 1}]
' > rule.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/cross-loop-action-card.sh" --rule rule.yaml --emit card 2>out.txt && grep -q 'origin=pr-corpus' out.txt && grep -q 'rule_id=no-eval' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
